title: Diverticulosis / Diverticulitis
subtitle: Understanding diverticulosis and diverticulitis — what they mean and how to stay well
description: Clear, evidence-based information about diverticular disease — what diverticulosis and diverticulitis are, how they are treated, diet advice, and when to seek help. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
